dataList.desc:
Something glowing yellow hurriedly steps in front of us, blocking our path.

"Would you mind stopping for a moment, please?"

"You see... there's a rather fussy child playing with her friends up ahead."

"Keeping the child entertained for as long as she wants is a tall order, so I've been waiting here to lend a helping hand."

"Tell me, which assistance would you like?"<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to накладывает a survivability-enhancing effect on all allied и enemy units throughout this Section
result: Once they drank the rippling sap, the Sinners seemed to feel noticeably better.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to накладывает a урона-enhancing effect on all allied и enemy units throughout this Section
result: We decided to move on together with the butterflies.<size=0%>
We decided to enter the battle without receiving any help.<size=0%>

dataList.desc:
Something glowing yellow is waiting for us.

"Hello. It's been quite a while."

"There's a child waiting all alone up ahead, unable to arrive при the story's ending."

"I've been waiting here to lend a helping hand to anyone who would show the child what it means to end."

"Tell me, which assistance would you like?"<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to накладывает a survivability-enhancing effect on all allied и enemy units throughout this Section
result: The Sinners melted down the frozen sap и drank it. They seemed to feel noticeably better.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to накладывает a урона-enhancing effect on all allied и enemy units throughout this Section
result: We tucked the glittering wing scale away и continued ahead.<size=0%>
We decided to enter the battle without receiving any help.<size=0%>

dataList.desc:
The final stop.

A wayfarer tinged in the glow of the sunset approaches us.

"It would seem there is no need to say much."

"Make yourself comfortable и rest awhile. Of course, feel free to leave now если you're in a hurry."<size=0%>

options.message: Drink the sap и получает a good, long rest.
options.messageDesc: Select to накладывает a survivability-enhancing effect on all allied units throughout this Section
result: The Sinners quenched their thirst with sap и took a proper rest. They seemed to feel noticeably better.<size=0%>

options.message: Rest awhile и depart with the butterflies.
options.messageDesc: Select to накладывает a урона-enhancing effect on all allied units throughout this Section
result: We followed the butterflies, leaving the site while our fighting instincts were still sharp.<size=0%>
We decided to enter the battle without getting any rest.<size=0%>

dataList.name: Н-Тайм::The Past Choice Event
dataList.desc:
We managed to peel off the strands of red thread wrapped around the Abnormality.

How should we proceed?<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Past" Passive:
"при получении удара by a Sinner, Butterfly of Entangled Lives inflicts Burn и Burn Count on the said Sinner"
result: The illusion disperses, disappearing в the past.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Past" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Past'-Эксклюзивный скилл 'Kalpāgni' gains Финальная сила и its final Coin inflicts IQ урона On Hit"
result: The illusion disperses, disappearing в the past.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Past" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives inflicts ХП Healing Down и Wrath Fragility on Sinners who have enough Burn"
result: The illusion disperses, disappearing в the past.<size=0%>

dataList.name: Н-Тайм::The Present Choice Event
dataList.desc:
We managed to peel off the strands of red thread wrapped around the Abnormality.

How should we proceed?<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Present" Passive:
"When Butterfly of Entangled Lives hits Critically, it does notтеряет Poise Count; gains a large amount of Poise Potency и Count при Turn Start"
result: The illusion disperses, fading в the present.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Present" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Present'-Эксклюзивный скилл 'Smite the Wicked' gains Финальная сила и its final Coin raises Stagger Threshold On Hit"
result: The illusion disperses, fading в the present.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Present" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives deals more урона on Critical Hit based on its Poise Potency и Count"
result: The illusion disperses, fading в the present.<size=0%>

dataList.desc:
We managed to peel off the strands of red thread wrapped around the Abnormality.

How should we proceed?<size=0%>

result: The illusion disperses, crumbling в the future.<size=0%>
